name: Mafioso's Dice
short_description: A high-stakes mafia-themed dice and risk game. Four players roll dice to climb toward victory, then face off in deadly rounds of Russian roulette. Strategy, bluffing, and hidden cards determine who walks away alive.
detailed_description:
🔫 Mafioso’s Dice

Mafioso’s Dice is a strategic tabletop game that combines social deduction mechanics with dynamic dice gameplay.

Players take on hidden roles and, in each round, rely not only on luck but also on bluffing, persuasion, and strategic thinking to survive.

The objective is clear:
The game continues until only one mafia member remains at the table.

🔥 Key Features:

🎲 High-Stakes Dice Gameplay
Each round, players roll dice to earn points. The scoring system is based on poker-style hand combinations:

Pair, Three of a Kind, Full House, Four of a Kind, Straight, and other combinations award increasing points.

Players may strategically keep or reroll dice to form the highest possible combination.

🎯 The first player to reach 1200 points earns the right to “shoot.”

🔫 Russian Roulette Mechanic
Once a player reaches 1200 points, they choose a target and pull the trigger. At this moment, the game shifts from luck to pure social intelligence. The shooter must select a target carefully — all roles are hidden. Eliminating the wrong player can shift the balance of power, while eliminating the right one can create a decisive advantage toward winning the game.

New Feature: Roles
We’ve added unique roles! Each role comes with its own abilities and strategic advantages. Use your role wisely to change the course of the game:

  • Capo 

    The boss’s most trusted hitman. Can take out two targets at once.
    Effect: You can shoot two different players in the same turn.

  • Don 

    The undisputed leader of the family. Trying to kill them is suicide.
    Effect: Any player who tries to shoot you ends up shooting themselves.

  • Arm Dealer

    Weapons are his business. He knows the secrets of the chamber better than anyone.

    Effect: Whenever any player completes their score, you gain the right to see one of the loaded bullets. It does not have to be your turn.

  • Madman

    Fate decides who gets shot.

    Effect: When you fire, you cannot choose a target. You shoot a random living player, excluding yourself.

  • Politician

    He knows how to redirect a bullet.

    Effect: If someone shoots at you, you choose another target. The attacking player must shoot the new target you selected.

  • Consigliere

    Invisible, but aware of everything.

    Effect: When you complete your score, you see the roles of all players at the table.

  • Two Face

    Life and death are decided by a coin.

    Effect: If someone shoots at you, a coin is flipped. Whichever side it lands on, that player shoots themselves.

  • Underboss

    The boss’s right-hand. Hard to take down on the first attempt.

    Effect: If someone shoots at you, you do not die from the first bullet, even if it is loaded. This effect only blocks the first bullet.

🧠 Strategy, Bluffing & Mind Games
Fate Cards mean the game isn't just about dice and bullets. With hidden powers, bluffing, threatening, and building (or breaking) trust are key tactics at the table.

🕴️ Stylized Mafia-Themed Atmosphere
Dark, smoky, and retro—a noir mafia world brought to life. Eye contact, silent deals, and dramatic finales define the vibe.

👥 4-Player Online Co-op Thriller

supported_languages: English, Turkish, French, German, Simplified Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Spanish - Latin America, Polish, Russian
